PROP-01b-partial3-inv-003.text: LINK payment is always pulled from bidder AFTER callback execution completes.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-003.assertion: forall bid(cb): safeTransferFrom(bidder, assetOut) executes strictly after auctionCallback returns

locations.note: safeTransferFrom(bidder, assetOutAmount) executed after auctionCallback; ordering enforces payment after delivery
